name: mock-web-monorepo
description: Stand-in for web-monorepo: a Next.js 15 app that composes per-market pages from omazifier composition files.

scripts.build:uk: MARKET=uk npm run prune-registry && MARKET=uk PRUNED=1 npm run build
scripts.build:de: MARKET=de npm run prune-registry && MARKET=de PRUNED=1 npm run build
scripts.build:fr: MARKET=fr npm run prune-registry && MARKET=fr PRUNED=1 npm run build
scripts.infra:bootstrap: npm run open-next:uk && cdk --app 'npx tsx infra/bin/app.ts' --output /tmp/omazifier-market.out bootstrap aws://$AWS_ACCOUNT_ID/${AWS_REGION:-eu-west-2} && cdk --app 'npx tsx infra/bin/app.ts' --output /tmp/omazifier-market.out bootstrap aws://$AWS_ACCOUNT_ID/us-east-1
scripts.infra:deploy:uk: npm run open-next:uk && cdk --app 'npx tsx infra/bin/app.ts' --output /tmp/omazifier-market.out deploy Omazifier-UK --require-approval never
scripts.infra:deploy:de: npm run open-next:de && cdk --app 'npx tsx infra/bin/app.ts' --output /tmp/omazifier-market.out deploy Omazifier-DE --require-approval never
scripts.infra:deploy:fr: npm run open-next:fr && cdk --app 'npx tsx infra/bin/app.ts' --output /tmp/omazifier-market.out deploy Omazifier-FR --require-approval never
scripts.infra:reset: npm run infra:destroy:all && npm run infra:shared:destroy
